pr.title: Learned Routing + Two-Pass N-gram Rescoring + Extended Orders (2-12)

output.summary: Pairing a learned Linear(512→12) mixer routing head with two-pass cold-cache rescoring and TTT-adapted n-gram eval using orders 2‑12 and 8M buckets.
techniques: Linear(512→12) mixer gating with frozen n-gram oracle and neural floor
Two-pass rescoring of first 15 chunks after full cache build
Extended orders 2‑12 with 8M buckets feeding TTT-adapted n-gram evaluation
